final_output:
=== Step 1 (Program Manager) ===
Feature Name: Email Ingestion System
Description: This feature enables seamless integration with email services via SMTP, IMAP, and RESTful APIs. It allows real-time email retrieval and preprocessing to extract relevant metadata and content.
Key Functionality: Connects to designated email services, retrieves incoming messages in real-time, preprocesses emails to extract metadata (sender, recipient, subject, timestamp).
User Benefit: Users benefit from the system's ability to efficiently and accurately retrieve and process incoming emails, ensuring timely responses and streamlined email management.

Feature Name: Message Classification Module
Description: This feature utilizes LLM-based classifiers to analyze email content and determine intent and category. It assigns confidence scores to decide between automated responses and manual handling.
Key Functionality: Analyzes email content to determine intent and category, assigns confidence scores, guides subsequent actions.
User Benefit: Users benefit from accurate classification of incoming emails, enabling automated responses for routine inquiries and efficient handling of complex communications by subject matter experts.

Feature Name: Knowledge Base Integration
Description: This feature implements a vector database for efficient storage and retrieval of organizational knowledge. It includes a continuous learning mechanism to update the knowledge base with new information from resolved inquiries.
Key Functionality: Stores and retrieves organizational knowledge efficiently, updates knowledge base with new information.
User Benefit: Users benefit from access to a comprehensive knowledge base that improves response accuracy, consistency, and efficiency in handling inquiries.

Feature Name: Response Generation Engine
Description: This feature deploys a RAG system to generate contextually accurate and human-like responses. It includes an approval workflow for reviewing and editing automated responses before dispatch.
Key Functionality: Generates contextually accurate responses, includes approval workflow for review and editing.
User Benefit: Users benefit from the system's ability to generate accurate and timely responses to inquiries, maintaining consistent messaging and improving overall communication quality.

Feature Name: Routing Logic
Description: This feature develops a rules-based engine to assign emails to appropriate subject matter experts based on content analysis. It includes context-aware forwarding with relevant metadata and previous correspondence history.
Key Functionality: Assigns emails to appropriate SMEs, includes context-aware forwarding.
User Benefit: Users benefit from efficient and accurate routing of complex inquiries to the right experts, ensuring timely and effective responses to customer communications.

Feature Name: User Interface
Description: This feature creates a comprehensive dashboard for monitoring system performance, including metrics on response times and accuracy. It provides a configuration panel for managing the knowledge base, routing rules, and system settings, with manual override options.
Key Functionality: Displays performance metrics, offers configuration options, allows manual intervention.
User Benefit: Users benefit from a user-friendly interface that enables easy monitoring of system performance, customization of settings, and intervention when necessary to ensure smooth operation and optimal outcomes.

=== Step 2 (Product Manager) ===
As a customer, I want to be able to easily browse products on the website, so that I can quickly find what I am looking for.

As a customer, I want to be able to filter search results by price, brand, and category, so that I can narrow down my options.

As a customer, I want to be able to read detailed product descriptions and view high-quality images, so that I can make an informed purchasing decision.

As a customer, I want to be able to add items to my shopping cart and easily proceed to checkout, so that I can complete my purchase efficiently.

As a customer, I want to receive email notifications about my order status and shipping updates, so that I can track my package and know when to expect delivery.

As a customer, I want to be able to easily return or exchange products, so that I can have a hassle-free shopping experience.

As a customer, I want to be able to provide feedback and reviews on products, so that I can share my opinions with other shoppers.

As a customer, I want to have access to a customer support chat feature, so that I can quickly get assistance with any questions or issues I may have.

=== Step 3 (Product Manager) ===
As a new user, I want to be able to create an account so that I can access the platform.

Development tasks:
1. Design user interface for account creation page.
2. Implement backend logic to store user account information securely.
3. Develop frontend validation for account creation form.
4. Write unit tests to ensure account creation functionality works as expected.

As a returning user, I want to be able to log in to my account so that I can access my saved information.

Development tasks:
1. Design user interface for login page.
2. Implement authentication logic to verify user credentials.
3. Develop frontend validation for login form.
4. Write unit tests to ensure login functionality works as expected.

As a frequent user, I want to be able to save items to my wishlist so that I can easily access them later.

Development tasks:
1. Design user interface for wishlist feature.
2. Implement backend logic to store wishlist items for each user.
3. Develop frontend functionality to add and remove items from the wishlist.
4. Write unit tests to ensure wishlist feature works as expected.

As an admin user, I want to be able to manage user accounts so that I can ensure the security of the platform.

Development tasks:
1. Design user interface for admin user management page.
2. Implement backend logic to allow admins to view and modify user accounts.
3. Develop frontend functionality for admins to search for and update user accounts.
4. Write unit tests to ensure admin user management functionality works as expected.
